description: Places an AdRoll pixel on your site for remarketing campaigns. Get advertiser ID and pixel ID from your AdRoll account. Optionally enable conversion tracking with value and currency. Default consent: remarketing.

common_use_cases: Standard remarketing pixel on all pages
Conversion tracking for purchases or signups

template_options.description: AdRoll pixel configuration. Must include advertiser_id and pixel_id.

template_options.advertiser_id.description: Advertiser ID from AdRoll. Find it in AdRoll under tracking code (pixel).

template_options.pixel_id.description: Pixel ID from AdRoll. Find it in AdRoll under tracking code (pixel).

template_options.conversion_data.description: Enable conversion tracking. Conforms to AdRoll Enhanced Conversion Tracking. When set, conversion_value and currency are required.

structure.conversion_value: number (>=0) or variable reference - Amount to count
structure.currency: string (3-letter ISO, e.g. USD) or variable reference

template_options.conversion_data.convers.description: Conversion amount to report to AdRoll.

respect_visitors_privacy.description: Respect DNT header and opt-out. Off by default for AdRoll.
respect_visitors_privacy.recommendation: Turn on if you want to respect Do-Not-Track and opt-out preferences

disable_in_debug_mode.description: Disable when Tag Manager is in debug mode

scheduler.description: Flight dates - when the tag should fire (date ranges, times of day)

basic_pixel.prerequisite: Get advertiser_id and pixel_id from AdRoll > tracking code (pixel). Use a page_view trigger.

with_conversion.prerequisite: Use a form submission or custom event trigger that fires on purchase/signup. Pass actual order value via variable if dynamic.

common_mistakes: Using wrong advertiser_id or pixel_id - copy from AdRoll tracking code
Setting conversion_data without both conversion_value and currency
Using page_view trigger for conversion tag - use purchase/signup trigger instead
Forgetting consent_type - remarketing typically requires remarketing consent

pixel_not_firing: Verify advertiser_id and pixel_id are correct (check AdRoll dashboard)
Ensure trigger is attached and fires (page_view for remarketing, form/custom for conversion)
Check consent_type matches your consent form
conversion_not_tracking: Ensure conversion_data has both conversion_value and currency
Use a trigger that fires on purchase/signup (not page view)
Pass dynamic value via variable: {{ Order Total }}
respect_visitors_privacy: Off by default - pixel fires even with DNT/opt-out
Set to true to respect Do-Not-Track and opt-out form
